summary: The diff implements Internet Identity login/logout in the Navigation component (desktop sidebar and mobile bottom tab bar) and updates the Profile page to display the truncated principal when authenticated. Both REQ-13 and REQ-14 appear substantially implemented. REQ-13's login/logout buttons use the useInternetIdentity hook, match the coral theme, and are present on both layouts. REQ-14 shows truncated principal in navigation and profile header, with fallback to mock data when unauthenticated.
